title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers video demonstrates building four agents from scratch using Strands Agents SDK, progressing from single-tool to multi-agent orchestration. The tutorial emphasizes that agents are fundamentally loops where models reason, select tools, execute them, and repeat until reaching an answer.
